## Meeting Purpose

[Onboarding and orientation for new team member Kirkland Gee, covering tools, workflows, and projects at growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/UvAJPqRg6cyVLP1GxfCymsWRXMZPKtG9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Kirkland to focus on absorbing context this week, including watching client calls and exploring internal tools/documents](https://fathom.video/share/UvAJPqRg6cyVLP1GxfCymsWRXMZPKtG9?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [Key tools: Circle (LMS), GitHub (workflows), Intemporo (execution), Flow Studio (IDE), AirTable (strategy/data)](https://fathom.video/share/UvAJPqRg6cyVLP1GxfCymsWRXMZPKtG9?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Main projects: Flow (API workflows), Flow Studio (UI), Atlas (replacing AirOps/Notion), and future product development](https://fathom.video/share/UvAJPqRg6cyVLP1GxfCymsWRXMZPKtG9?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Emphasis on AI engineering theory, particularly Chapter 5 of an unnamed book on prompting engineering](https://fathom.video/share/UvAJPqRg6cyVLP1GxfCymsWRXMZPKtG9?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)

## Topics

### Onboarding Progress and Access

  - [Kirkland received access to Slack, Notion, Fathom, OnePass, Google account](https://fathom.video/share/UvAJPqRg6cyVLP1GxfCymsWRXMZPKtG9?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Still needed access to Circle and AirTable (Daniel provided during meeting)](https://fathom.video/share/UvAJPqRg6cyVLP1GxfCymsWRXMZPKtG9?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - Basecamp projects access to be confirmed

### Key Learning Resources

  - [Circle LMS: Contains courses on workflow creation and client management](https://fathom.video/share/UvAJPqRg6cyVLP1GxfCymsWRXMZPKtG9?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [Recommended book: Chapter 5 on prompting engineering crucial for team](https://fathom.video/share/UvAJPqRg6cyVLP1GxfCymsWRXMZPKtG9?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [GitHub repos: 'flow' (workflows) and 'flow-studio' (IDE) are primary codebases](https://fathom.video/share/UvAJPqRg6cyVLP1GxfCymsWRXMZPKtG9?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [Basecamp: Used for task management and project planning](https://fathom.video/share/UvAJPqRg6cyVLP1GxfCymsWRXMZPKtG9?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)

### Workflow System Overview

  - [Workflows built on Intemporo (distributed systems runtime)](https://fathom.video/share/UvAJPqRg6cyVLP1GxfCymsWRXMZPKtG9?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Each workflow is a self-contained folder with steps, functions, and prompts](https://fathom.video/share/UvAJPqRg6cyVLP1GxfCymsWRXMZPKtG9?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Execution viewable through Intemporo UI or custom Flow Studio interface](https://fathom.video/share/UvAJPqRg6cyVLP1GxfCymsWRXMZPKtG9?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
  - [Example workflow: SEO content creation (3-minute process, multiple steps)](https://fathom.video/share/UvAJPqRg6cyVLP1GxfCymsWRXMZPKtG9?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)

### Current Projects and Future Plans

  - [Atlas: Project to replace AirOps and Notion with custom solution](https://fathom.video/share/UvAJPqRg6cyVLP1GxfCymsWRXMZPKtG9?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Potential AI-driven email project in early planning stages](https://fathom.video/share/UvAJPqRg6cyVLP1GxfCymsWRXMZPKtG9?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
